author: Dr. Priya Anand / Dr. Alan Whitfield
content:
MEDICINE CO-MANAGEMENT — DAILY PROGRESS NOTE
POD#3 s/p open cholecystectomy.

SUBJECTIVE: Continues to feel well. No palpitations, chest pain, or dyspnea. Eager to go home; asked when she can drive again.

OBJECTIVE:
- Afebrile, hemodynamically stable; ambulating independently; regular diet.
- Telemetry: NO atrial fibrillation on POD#2 OR POD#3 (sinus rhythm throughout the last 48 hours).
- Surgical site healing well.

ASSESSMENT/PLAN:
#Atrial fibrillation noted on telemetry POD#1 — no recurrence over the last 48 h. Telemetry continuing through the remainder of admission.
#HTN — restart home antihypertensives as tolerating diet; BP at her usual (above goal).
#T2DM — resume metformin at discharge once eating reliably; glucose acceptable on correctional insulin.
#Cholecystitis s/p chole — improving with Surgery.
Anticipated discharge POD#5 (6/15) if no further events.
attestation: Electronically signed by Dr. Priya Anand, MD (PGY-2) and Dr. Alan Whitfield, MD. 6/13/2027.
